name: obsidian-claude-config
description: Crystal's personal Claude Code customization for working with multiple Obsidian vaults. Provides skills for multi-agent orchestration patterns, infra recovery (APFS sparse / Vite hangs / editor CSS), Crystal-specific plugin development gotchas, and an English-description note frontmatter standard. Adapted from johnfkoo951/cmds-system-files (CMDS v4.2).
